mapper.insert: insert into hug (target_type, target_id, anonymous_id, create_time) values (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{anonymousId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from hug where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId} and anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}
mapper.select: select * from hug where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}

SELECT c.*, t.topic_name as topicName, u.avatar FROM content c LEFT JOIN topic t ON c.topic_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON c.anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id JOIN hug h ON c.id = h.target_id WHERE h.anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} AND h.target_type = 1 ORDER BY h.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.delete: delete from hug where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}
